km.Genova, Italie: ជេណូវ៉ា, លីហ្គuរីយ៉ា, ប្រទេសអ៊ីតាលី

zh.Genova, Italie: 義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marchione della Volta於1130年出生在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦時，他的父親Ingone della Volta25歲，母親Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria15歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1164年享年34歲。

zh-hans.Genova, Italie: 意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marchione della Volta于1130年出生在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦时，他的父亲Ingone della Volta25岁，母亲Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria15岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1164年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: habitational name from Pella in Novara province.
Italian: possibly a shortened form of Iacopella, a pet form of the personal name Iacopa, feminine form of Iacopo (see Jacob ), or of Filippella, a pet form of Filippa, feminine form of Filippo .
possibly Catalan: from old Catalan pella ‘used clothes’, perhaps a nickname for someone poorly dressed.

variants.name: Jacob
meanings: Jewish, English, Welsh, German, Portuguese, French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, Swedish, Danish, and Norwegian: derivative, via Latin Jacob(us), from the Hebrew personal name Ya‘aqob (Yaakov). In the Bible, this is the name of the crafty younger twin brother of Esau (Genesis 25:26), who took advantage of the latter's hunger and impetuousness to persuade him to part with his birthright ‘for a mess of potage’. The name is traditionally interpreted as coming from Hebrew akev ‘heel’: Jacob is said to have been born holding on to Esau's heel. In English usage the name Jacob is regarded as distinct from the name James , but they are of identical origin. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Yaqub , Yakub , Yacoub , or Yacob , Slovenian Jakob and Jakop, Czech and Slovak Jakub , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Jacobs and Jacobson ). The name Jacob is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Chacko ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Volta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called with the word volta ‘turn’, ‘vault’.
from a shortened form of a medieval personal name such as Bonavolta, literally ‘good fortune’, or Malavolta ‘bad fortune’.

nameMeanings.name: Marchione
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Rocco, Angelo, Vito, Adriana, Aldo, Armando, Evo, Pasquale, Rodolfo, Romolo, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): nickname from marchione ‘marquis’, from medieval Latin marchio, genitive marchionis, from ancient Germanic marka ‘borderland’. See also Marchese .

variants.name: Marchese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Rocco, Sal, Antonio, Carlo, Giuseppe, Santo, Donato, Franco, Gaetano.

Italian: from the title of rank marchése ‘marquis’ (in Italy the rank immediately below that of duke), probably applied as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis, or an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. However, 13th- and 14th-century documents show that the term was also used as a personal name at that time.

variants.name: Marchioni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Dario, Dino, Fedele, Filippo, Tullio.
Italian (southern): patronymic or plural form of   Marchione  .

en.lifeSummary: When Marchione della Volta was born in 1130, in Genova, Liguria, Italy, his father, Ingone della Volta, was 25 and his mother, Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, was 15. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1164, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marchione della Volta est né en 1130, à Genova, Liguria, Italie, son père, Ingone della Volta, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1164, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marchione della Volta 1130 in Genova, Liguria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ingone della Volta 25 und seine Mutter Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria 15. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1164 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marchione della Volta è nato il nel 1130 nel Genova, Liguria, Italia, il suo padre, Ingone della Volta, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1164, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Genova, Italie: イタリアリグリアジェノヴァ
ja.lifeSummary: Marchione della Voltaが1130年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァで生まれた時，父Ingone della Voltaは25歳，母Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doriaは15歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1164年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marchione della Volta(이)가 1130년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ingone della Volta(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria(은)는 15세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1164년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marchione della Volta nasceu em 1130, em Genova, Liguria, Itália, seu pai, Ingone della Volta, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1164, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marchione della Volta родился в 1130 г. в местности дженова, лигуря, Италия, его отцу по имени Ingone della Volta было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, 15. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1164 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marchione della Volta nació en 1130, en Genova, Liguria, Italia, su papá, Ingone della Volta, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Giulia « dite Cortesina » Doria, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1164, a la edad de 34 años.
